CONTACT
US

A question about your access or a technical problem?
Our teams are at your disposal.

Contact Us

@if ((contactForm.get('name')?.touched || submitted) && contactForm.get('name')?.invalid && contactForm.get('name')?.errors) {

@if (contactForm.get('name')?.errors?.['required']) { Name is required. } @if (contactForm.get('name')?.errors?.['minlength']) { Name must be at least 2 characters. }

}
@if ((contactForm.get('email')?.touched || submitted) && contactForm.get('email')?.invalid && contactForm.get('email')?.errors) {

@if (contactForm.get('email')?.errors?.['required']) { Email is required. } @if (contactForm.get('email')?.errors?.['email']) { Please enter a valid email address. }

}
@if ((contactForm.get('message')?.touched || submitted) && contactForm.get('message')?.invalid && contactForm.get('message')?.errors) {

@if (contactForm.get('message')?.errors?.['required']) { Message is required. } @if (contactForm.get('message')?.errors?.['minlength']) { Message must be at least 10 characters. }

}
